This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-6336-qqw9-v6x6. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.3.31 contains a logic error in Discord component interaction routing that misclassifies group direct messages as direct messages in extensions/discord/src/monitor/agent-components-helpers.ts. Attackers can exploit this misclassification to bypass group DM policy enforcement or trigger incorrect session handling.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pr66-whqj-rq5p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T21:48:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pr66-whqj-rq5p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pr66-whqj-rq5p"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-23T22:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T00:31:51Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-6336-qqw9-v6x6", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41341", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/8c83128fc38d5a3642b8ccbea58550755fdbbbaf", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-component-interaction-misclassification-in-discord-extension", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pr66-whqj-rq5p"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: OpenClaw: Discord Component Interaction Misclassifies Group DM as Direct Message", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-04T21:50:15Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pr66-whqj-rq5p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.3.31"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-04T21:48:28Z"}
